# Section 727(a)(8) -- Bankruptcy Discharge Waiting Period [2026]
> Section 727(a)(8) bars Chapter 7 discharge within 8 years of a prior filing. Calculate your eligibility date with our free 2026 screener.

## About
727a8.com is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Section 727(a)(9): Chapter 7 After Chapter 13 -- 6-Year Bar -- 727(a)(8): https://727a8.com/727a9.html
- All Bankruptcy Discharge Bars Compared -- 727(a)(8), 727(a)(9), 1328(f), 109(g): https://727a8.com/all-bars-compared.html
- When Can I File Chapter 7 Again? Free Date Calculator -- 727(a)(8): https://727a8.com/calculator.html
- Key Cases on Section 727(a)(8) -- 8-Year Discharge Bar Case Law: https://727a8.com/case-law.html
- Filing Chapter 13 After Chapter 7 -- Section 1328(f)(1) 4-Year Bar -- 727(a)(8): https://727a8.com/chapter-13-after-7.html
- 7 Common Mistakes When Refiling Chapter 7 After a Prior Bankruptcy -- 727(a)(8): https://727a8.com/common-mistakes.html
- Section 727(a)(9) -- The 6-Year Exception: Chapter 7 After Chapter 13 -- 727(a)(8): https://727a8.com/exceptions.html
- Filing Date to Filing Date -- How the Discharge Bar Is Measured -- 727(a)(8): https://727a8.com/filing-to-filing.html
- Good Faith Exception to the 727(a)(8) Discharge Bar -- There Is None: https://727a8.com/good-faith-exception.html
- Section 727(a)(8) -- Bankruptcy Discharge Waiting Period: https://727a8.com/
- Bankruptcy Discharge Bar Rules by State -- What Your State Exemptions Mean -- 727(a)(8): https://727a8.com/state-by-state.html
- 727(a)(8) vs 1328(f): Which Discharge Bar Applies to You?: https://727a8.com/vs-1328f.html
